description: A screenshot of a social-media (Truth Social-style) post by Donald J. Trump. The header shows his circular profile avatar (a stylized stars-and-stripes image), the display name 'Donald J. Trump' with a blue verified check and a black plus badge, and the handle '@realDonaldTrump.' The body is a block of plain black text on a white background: Trump states that 'the horrific tragedy that beset East Palestine in 2023, along with Sleepy Joe Biden's utterly incompetent response, must NEVER happen again,' recounts visiting East Palestine and forcing Biden/FEMA to send aid, attacks the prior administration for 'letting the rest of the World empty out their prisons and mental asylums' and 'SURRENDERING Afghanistan,' and urges Congress and all Republicans to include the Railway Safety Act in the Surface Transportation Reauthorization Bill, signed 'President DONALD J. TRUMP.' Apart from the native post UI, there is no custom graphic design, so this is a text-post screenshot rather than a designed meme. Rapid Response 47 amplified the statement to push the legislative ask and partisan messaging to a political audience.
notable_text: I have long said that the horrific tragedy that beset East Palestine in 2023... must NEVER happen again. | I am strongly urging Congress to include the Railway Safety Act... I am asking all Republicans to vote YES.
